name: Luscious Frozen Yogurt Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the graham cracker crumbs, carob powder, and melted margarine until well combined.
2. Press the mixture firmly against the bottom and side of a 9 X 1-1/4 inch pie plate.
3. Spoon the softened frozen yogurt onto the crust, spreading it carefully.
4. Cover with plastic wrap and freeze for 1-1/2 hours or until firm.
5. If frozen longer than 8 hours, let stand at room temperature for 5 to 10 minutes before cutting.
6. Serve with Carob-Peanut Sauce.
7. Freeze any remaining pie.
Note: This recipe yields 8 servings.
